name: wxcode-admin-coral-billing
title: Coral Admin
description: Clean light-mode SaaS admin aesthetic: white/near-white canvas (#f8f9fb), coral accent (#f43f5e / #fb7185), slate-blue navigation (#475569), soft-shadow cards with 1px borders, and tabular-nums on every figure. Archetype = fixed sidebar (logo + workspace switcher + grouped nav) + sticky topbar (search + period tabs + avatar) + 4 KPI cards + trend-chart card + breakdown bar card + records table + items-at-risk side panel, plus list / form / detail screens.

query.en: Apply this clean coral-accent light-mode admin aesthetic to my domain — fixed sidebar with workspace switcher, sticky topbar with search and period tabs, 4 KPI cards with sparklines, a trend chart, a breakdown bar chart, a records table with status pills, and an items-at-risk side panel, plus list / form / detail screens.
query.zh-CN: 将这个珊瑚强调色浅色管理风格应用到我的领域：带工作区切换器的固定侧边栏、带搜索和周期标签的顶栏、4 个带迷你折线图的 KPI 卡片、趋势图、细分条形图、带状态标签的记录表格和风险项侧面板，以及列表、表单和详情页面。

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
